name: You've hypnotized your predator friend.
description:
!VORE!

Recently, you read a book about hypnosis, and you wanted to try out your new knowledge. You asked your friend about it, and she agreed, and to your surprise, the hypnosis worked. How corrupted will you be?

So, I decided to experiment again and add customizable parameters to the messages. My advice is to use the maximum information analysis and use deep search to access online statistics.
